title: Port freight quarterly statistics: January to March 2025
body: " When comparing January to March 2025 with January to March 2024 through UK major ports:     total freight tonnage increased by 5% to 107.4 million tonnes    inward tonnage increased by 7% to 72.8 million tonnes    outward tonnage showed little change, increasing by just under 1%, to 34.6 million tonnes    total volume of unitised traffic increased by 3% to 4.8 million units    inward units increased by 3% to 2.6 million units    outward units increased by 2% to 2.2 million units     When comparing the rolling year to March 2025 with March 2024 through UK major ports:    total tonnage increased by 2% to 425.9 million tonnes    total volume of unitised traffic increased by 2% to 21.3 million units     Detailed final annual statistics for 2025 will be published in summer 2026.  Annual trends can be explored using our maritime statistics dashboard.  Contact us  Maritime and shipping statistics     Email maritime.stats@dft.gov.uk     Media enquiries 0300 7777 878       To hear more about DfT statistical publications as they are released, follow us on X at DfTstats.  "
